CustomField.formula:
IF(ISBLANK(Posted_For_Organization__c) && ISBLANK(Posted_For_Person__c), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_By__r.Id, Posted_By__r.FirstName + " " + Posted_By__r.LastName) + " posted a " + LOWER(TEXT(Type__c)) + " for you." ,
IF(!ISBLANK(Posted_For_Organization__c), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_By__r.Id, Posted_By__r.FirstName + " " + Posted_By__r.LastName) + " posted a " + LOWER(TEXT(Type__c)) + " for you on behalf of " + HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/detail/" + Posted_For_Organization__r.Id, Posted_For_Organization__r.Name)+"." ,
IF(!ISBLANK(Posted_For_Person__c), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_By__r.Id, Posted_By__r.FirstName + " " + Posted_By__r.LastName) + " posted a " + LOWER(TEXT(Type__c)) + " for you on behalf of " + HYPERLINK("https://fimby.my.site.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_For_Person__r.Id, Posted_For_Person__r.FirstName + " " + Posted_For_Person__r.LastName)+ "." , "")))
CustomField.label: Email Details
